# Dhanam

Compact LLM context index for this repository.

## Monetization session (read first)

When the goal is first revenue, checkout, billing, catalog, or entitlements:

- `AGENTS.md` — canonical agent operating instructions.
- `docs/MONETIZATION_SESSION.md` — **single monetization entrypoint**; repo vs private ops routing.
- `docs/MONETIZATION_PATH_READINESS.md` — current G0–G9 slice, gate table, ranked open tasks.
- `docs/FIRST_PESOS_COMMERCIAL_GA_MONETIZATION_2026-06-01.md` — full first-peso gate framework.
- `docs/runbooks/STRIPE_MXN_LIVE_FLIP.md` — live MXN flip (after secret restore + Stripe MX live).
- `docs/runbooks/ESSENTIALS_CFDI_RELAY.md` — Dhanam ↔ Karafiel Essentials CFDI relay (PR #573).
- `catalog.yaml` + `scripts/sync-catalog.ts` — SKU source of truth and Stripe/DB sync.
- `apps/api/src/modules/billing/README.md` — billing module (checkout, ledger, webhooks).
- `docs/TECH_DEBT.md` — active debt (TD-1009, TD-1010, TD-1014, TD-1017 migration).
- `docs/PLATFORM_MIGRATION_ROADMAP.md` — consumer import wizards (PM-1–PM-4).

Phase 0 platform blockers **MITIGATED 2026-06-16** — see
`internal-devops/runbooks/2026-06-16-dhanam-secrets-recovery-session.md`.
Phase 1 (Stripe MX + BBVA) is the next gate. Open `internal-devops` for operator
cutover; stay in dhanam for product/engineering work.

## General read order

- `README.md` — human/product overview when present.
- `docs/README.md` — canonical documentation map.
- `docs/GA_REMEDIATION_ROADMAP.md` — full GA program (stability + commercial +
  consumer); use for stability-only sessions.
- `docs/COMMERCIAL_GA_EXECUTION.md` — G2 commercial GA runbook (WS1–WS6) and
  staging commercial smoke configuration.
- `docs/ROADMAP.md` — stability priorities P0–P8 and milestones M1–M7.
- `docs/STABILITY_AUDIT_2026-05-19.md` — current stability, production,
  staging, DNS, health, and Enclii rollout status.
- `docs/STABILITY_WRAP_UP_2026-05-20.md` — concise latest stability wrap-up,
  verification state, blockers, and next order of work.
- `docs/TECH_DEBT.md` — current active technical debt and historical debt
  archive pointers.
- `docs/DOCUMENTATION_AUDIT_2026-05-22.md` — latest documentation corpus audit.
- `docs/runbooks/BREAK_GLASS.md` — break-glass procedures when Enclii adapters are missing.
- `docs/api/README.md` — OpenAPI export and API reference index.
- `docs/SESSION_WRAP_UP_2026-06-15.md` — latest session handoff (landing live, deploy ops, next picks).
- `docs/LANDING_REMEDIATION.md` — Dhanam marketing landing (`dhan.am`) UX remediation program.
- `docs/LANDING_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md` — landing typography, tokens, components (Dhanam product vs MADFAM company).
- `docs/HERO_IPAD_SHOWCASE.md` — hero 3D tablet + live embed showcase (tour, insets, rate limits).
- `ECOSYSTEM.md` — MADFAM ecosystem and Enclii deployment context when present.
- `llms-full.txt` — full context map and durable operating contract.
- `tools/agent-manifest.json` — machine-readable repo metadata.

## Production operations

Routine production operations are Enclii-first. Use Enclii web, API, or CLI
before raw infrastructure tools. Direct `kubectl`, `helm`, SSH, provider CLIs,
`docker exec`, or direct container access is bootstrap/break-glass only.
